Meta.title: Patent-Scan — check your invention's uniqueness
Meta.description: AI portal for patent clearance: Rospatent + EPO + USPTO in one minute.

Common.tagline: Check your invention's uniqueness in a minute

hero.title: Check your invention's uniqueness before visiting a patent attorney
hero.subtitle: Drop a description — AI builds the queries, hits 3 patent databases in parallel, returns a structured report with a recommendation.
hero.disclaimer: Not legal advice. The report is a reference point: iterate, file, or consult an expert.

steps.title: Describe your invention
steps.body: Plain text in any language and jargon. AI extracts keywords and IPC classes automatically.

steps.title: Parallel search
steps.body: Rospatent PatSearch (150M patents), EPO Espacenet OPS, USPTO. Duplicates merged by publication ID.

steps.title: Report & recommendation
steps.body: Overview, key analogs with overlaps and differences, geography, trends, final recommendation. PDF + web view.

items.title: Up to 30 relevant patents
items.body: Titles, years, countries, IPC codes, clickable links to the original records in each database.

items.title: Analysis of 5–10 key analogs
items.body: For each: similarity (High/Medium/Low), what overlaps, what differs from your invention.

items.title: Classification by direction
items.body: Patents grouped by technical approach — you see which directions are already taken.

items.title: Final recommendation
items.body: High/Medium/Low uniqueness + the concrete next step: iterate, file, or visit a patent attorney.

sources.title: Data sources
sources.subtitle: Only official open databases. We never fabricate data.

items.name: Rospatent PatSearch
items.meta: 150M patents · RU, SU, CIS, US, EP, WO

ctaBlock.title: Ready to check your invention?
ctaBlock.subtitle: Uploading a description takes 1 minute. The report is ready in 1–2 minutes.

Search.title: Describe your invention
Search.subtitle: The more detail you provide, the sharper the search. Russian, English, and technical jargon all work.
Search.textareaPlaceholder: For example: An automatic plastic waste sorting system using infrared spectral analysis and neural network classification by polymer type…
Search.clarifySubtitle: AI will ask a few questions to narrow the search. Answers are optional.

questions.q: What is the key technical technique?
questions.placeholder: e.g. neural network, spectral analysis, mechanical gripping

questions.q: What distinguishes it from known analogs?

Search.loading: Building queries and polling patent databases…
Search.loadingHint: Usually takes 1–2 minutes. Please keep this tab open.
Search.loadingGateHint: Checking technical features, application area and the problem solved.
Search.loadingSearch: Searching Rospatent, EPO, USPTO, JP, CN…
Search.gateReason: Description accepted: {reason}. Skipping follow-up and starting the search.

Report.title: Uniqueness check report
Report.subtitle: Preview version of the report. A reference point, not a legal opinion.
Report.emptyBody: None of the sources returned relevant publications for your description. Try rephrasing — add key terms or the application area.
Report.errorBody: One of the services returned an error. Please retry or adjust the description.
Report.missingBody: Looks like you opened this page directly. Start from the invention description.

Landscape.title: Patent landscape
Landscape.subtitle: Describe a technology area — we build a patent map: key directions, geography, timeline, trends.
Landscape.textareaPlaceholder: For example: Processing of low-grade tin concentrates: pyrometallurgy, hydrometallurgy, cassiterite beneficiation, tin recovery from slags and secondary feedstocks…
Landscape.loadingHint: Usually takes 1–2 minutes. Please keep this tab open.

LandscapeReport.title: Patent landscape
LandscapeReport.missingBody: Looks like you opened this page directly. Start from a topic description.
LandscapeReport.emptyBody: Patent databases returned no relevant publications for this topic. Try rephrasing — add key terms or the application area.
